---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: LadislavSopko
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case
What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

## MCP Client
Which MCP client(s) would benefit from this? (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, all)

## Additional Context
Any additional context, mockups, or examples.
